provenance.source: Alam et al. (2021), Completed SDSS-IV extended Baryon Oscillation Spectroscopic Survey
provenance.survey: SDSS DR17 / eBOSS final data release
provenance.notes: Consensus BAO-only measurements from Tables 3 and 5 of Alam et al. (2021). D_V/r_d is the angle-averaged distance ratio. D_M/r_d and D_H/r_d are the transverse and line-of-sight measurements where available. All uncertainties are 1-sigma. BOSS galaxy reconstruction uses LCDM mocks; eBOSS Lya has minimal model dependence.

columns.D_V_over_rd: Angle-averaged distance D_V divided by the sound horizon r_d
columns.D_M_over_rd: Comoving angular diameter distance D_M divided by r_d
columns.D_H_over_rd: Hubble distance D_H = c/H(z) divided by r_d
columns.tracer: Galaxy tracer type used for the measurement
